data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for separate policies for different roles.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for separate policies for different roles (drivers, warehouse, office). However, the provided evidence does not include any specific information or functionality that confirms this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for separate policies, but there is no evidence demonstrating that this feature is implemented or operational, leading to an inconclusive validation.
gaps: No evidence of separate policies for different roles.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
